title: [cross-impl] OSCORE/EDHOC KDF label encoding mismatch
description: Rust uses tstr labels ("7","10") in edhoc.rs:328-340 edhoc_kdf info CBOR; C/Zephyr + Python use uint(7/10/0/1). Causes divergent master_secret/salt. Affects all recent edhoc.rs and oscore.c changes. Align to integer labels per RFC9528 + vectors.
